name: Gold Miner
short_description: The Gold Miner is a puzzle game. The goal of the game is to collect all nuggets and jewels in the level and avoid barrels with gunpowder.Collect gems, score points, upgrade your equipment! Try to complete all 20 levels as soon as possible, will you succeed ?!
detailed_description:
The Gold Miner is a puzzle game. The goal of the game is to collect all nuggets and jewels in the level and avoid barrels with gunpowder.
Collect gems, score points, upgrade your equipment! Try to complete all 20 levels as soon as possible, will you succeed ?!

Game features:
- PC controls: Keyboard/Mouse.
- 20 levels
- Game shop
- Nice music

Made in Construct 2. Enjoy the games!
